name: Omnichess: Chess Variants
short_description: Omnichess is the game that allows you to design and play your very own chess variants! With AI and online play there are a huge variety of options: 2-8 players • Square, hexagonal, or triangular tiled boards • Rule alterations • Timer options • Customised pieces
detailed_description:
Free subscription

All purchases of Omnichess Steam Edition now come with a free Lifetime Subscription! Enjoy playing the game with no restrictions and all in-game items unlocked.


About the Game

Omnichess is the game that allows you to design and play your very own chess variants! With AI and online play there are a huge variety of options including:

👫 2 - 8 players. All against all or team based play.

⭐ Square, hexagonal, or triangular tiled chess boards.

🥇 Win conditions including Checkmate, Play for points, Tile capture, and Annihilation.

⌛ Interval, Bronstein, and Hour Glass timer options.

🕓 Asymmetric move timers. Give yourself extra move time against a more experienced player to even the odds.

♟ Rule alterations like enabling en passant on bishops or castling on any pair of pieces!

👾 Define how a chess piece moves and choose from over 40 piece icons

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Spanish - Latin America, Indonesian, Korean, Thai, Turkish, Vietnamese, Bangla, Hindi
